label: Medical Emergency
description: Life-threatening medical situations requiring immediate intervention
steps: Check if the person is breathing and responsive
Call 108 or your local ambulance service immediately
Keep the person still and in a safe position
Begin CPR if trained and the person is not breathing
Do not give food or water until help arrives
guidance: Stay calm and speak clearly when calling emergency services
Note the exact location and any visible injuries
If chest pain, help the person sit upright and loosen tight clothing
For bleeding, apply firm pressure with a clean cloth

helplines.name: Unified Emergency Number
helplines.description: Single emergency number for police, fire, and medical
